nasb.text: David also said, “As the Lord lives, surely the Lord will strike him, or his day will come that he dies, or he will go down into battle and perish.

esv.text: And David said, “As the Lord lives, the Lord will strike him, or his day will come to die, or he will go down into battle and perish.

cnv.text: 大衛又說：“我指著永活的耶和華起誓，他或被耶和華擊打，或死期到了，或下到戰場陣亡了，

ccb.text: 我凭永活的耶和华起誓，耶和华必亲手击杀他。他要么寿终而死，要么命丧沙场。
